title: all_users() full table scan on every connect
description: ws.rs calls state.inner.store.all_users() on every successful authentication. This is a full table scan + sort. At N users and K concurrent connections, connect bursts trigger K parallel scans. The code comment notes this and says 'do not optimize prematurely — benchmark first'. That is correct advice; this is flagged for when user count grows past a few hundred. The comment itself is good self-documentation.
